test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_u64_{card} (k UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY k
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_u64_{card} SELECT number % {card} FROM numbers_mt(10000000)
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_str (s String) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY s
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_str SELECT toString(number % 100) FROM numbers_mt(10000000)
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_lc (lc LowCardinality(String)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY lc
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_lc SELECT toLowCardinality(toString(number % 100)) FROM numbers_mt(10000000)
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_nullable (nk Nullable(UInt64)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY nk SETTINGS allow_nullable_key = 1
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_nullable SELECT if(number % 17 = 0, NULL, number % 100) FROM numbers_mt(10000000)
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_datetime (dt DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY dt
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_datetime SELECT toDateTime(1700000000 + number % 100) FROM numbers_mt(10000000)
test.query: SELECT k FROM test_u64_{card} ORDER BY k LIMIT -1 BY k FORMAT Null
SELECT s FROM test_str ORDER BY s LIMIT -1 BY s FORMAT Null
SELECT lc FROM test_lc ORDER BY lc LIMIT -1 BY lc FORMAT Null
SELECT nk FROM test_nullable ORDER BY nk LIMIT -1 BY nk FORMAT Null
SELECT dt FROM test_datetime ORDER BY dt LIMIT -1 BY dt FORMAT Null
